nasb.text: And sending away the crowds, Jesus got into the boat and came to the region of Magadan.

esv.text: And after sending away the crowds, he got into the boat and went to the region of Magadan.

cnv.text: 耶穌解散了群眾，就上了船，來到馬加丹地區。

ccb.text: 随后，耶稣叫众人散去，自己坐船去了马加丹地区。

csbs.text: 耶稣遣散了人群以后，就上了船，来到茉加丹地区。
